gloss:
Statement of record: `Eidometry.Thesis.quotient_certificate_sound` (Eidometry thesis, section Executed runs).

Whenever a Boolean checker accepts a quotient certificate, the certified relation is a fixed point of the partition-refinement step. The engine's claim that its partition has stabilized is itself certificate-checkable.

Discharged by [MTH.R-2026-1206].

statement.pretty: ∀ {S : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype S] [inst_1 : DecidableEq S] {V : Type u_2} [inst_2 : DecidableEq V] {A : Type u_3} [inst_3 : Fintype A] {Q : Type u_4} [inst_4 : DecidableEq Q] [inst_5 : AddCommMonoid Q] (c : WMSpec.Compiler.QuotCert S V A Q), WMSpec.Compiler.checkQuotCert c = true → WMSpec.Compiler.refineStep (WMSpec.Compiler.EidProgram.words (WMSpec.Compiler.QuotCert.prog c)) (WMSpec.Compiler.QuotCert.rel c) = WMSpec.Compiler.QuotCert.rel c

title: Eidometry.Thesis.quotient_certificate_sound
